mapper.insert: insert into orders (number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, user_name, phone, address, consignee, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_status, delivery_time, pack_amount, tableware_number, tableware_status) values ( #{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{addressBookId}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{userName}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{consignee}, #{cancelReason}, #{rejectionReason}, #{cancelTime}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryTime}, #{packAmount}, #{tablewareNumber}, #{tablewareStatus})
mapper.update:
update orders
status = #{status},
cancel_reason = #{cancelReason},
cancel_time = #{cancelTime},
pay_status = #{payStatus},
checkout_time = #{checkoutTime},
rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason},
delivery_time = #{deliveryTime},
user_name = #{userName},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select count(id) from orders
and status = #{status}
